prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, let’s do this! You’ve got the strength and the smarts to tackle this task, and putting it off isn’t going to make it any easier. Here’s the thing: once you start, you’ll find that it’s not as daunting as it seems. Break it down into smaller steps, focus on one thing at a time, and before you know it, you’ll be halfway through. You’ve got this! You’ve conquered harder challenges before, and you will conquer this one too. So take a deep breath, roll up your sleeves, and let’s get it done! You’re capable, you’re determined, and you’re about to crush this!
